title: $IPC_ASYNC
text: $IPC_ASYNC Create a thread that listens for interprocess communication (IPC) messages. $IPC_ASYNC Defaults Assignment file: application assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description This assignment setting causes a thread to be created at application start-up that listens for IPC messages. For each received message, the receiveMessage trigger (at application level or component level) is fired and the message is returned in $result . Related Links $result Return the result of certain ProcScript commands and tree widget events. trigger receiveMessage Reacts to asynchronous messages that come from outside the application.
